description: Red Lion Crimson 3.0 is open. As a plant automation engineer for a glass manufacturing plant, update the SCADA system for Forehearth 2 (FH2) by configuring five Formula/Numeric Tags named Z1_Avg_Temp through Z5_Avg_Temp. Using the engineering specifications and maintenance log located in the CrimsonTasks folder on the Desktop, set each tag to calculate the mathematical average of the raw thermocouple tags for its respective zone. The Zone 3 formula must be adjusted to account for the failed sensor documented in the maintenance log. Ensure all five tags are configured with the Float data type, 'deg C' units, and High Alarm limits as defined in the specifications. Save the project as 'forehearth_configured.c3' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\.
